summary: Tested new AI Advisor features (context-aware chat, Markdown+Copy, personalized suggestions). 7/7 backend advisor tests pass, all requested frontend flows work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: advisor.py /suggestions: personalized flag is True if any specs data present (even without health) - fine for admin case but could mislead if user has empty specs. Consider tying to bool(health) only.
ai_engine.py: emergentintegrations model 'claude-sonnet-4-6' is provider-specific; ensure key handles model unavailability with a friendlier error than the raw exception injected into stream.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (specs-badge, personalized suggestions, ai-code-block, ai-code-copy with Copiato feedback, new-chat-btn, streaming chat)

seed_data_creation: Chat sessions created during streaming test were deleted at end of test suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_advisor.py covers /suggestions (shape + personalized + auth-guard), /chat streaming (session marker + PowerShell code block + context-aware), /sessions (create/list/get messages/delete). Uses admin cookie session. Response is real Claude via Emergent LLM key, ~5-10s per chat.
